response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid full-stack and systems engineering experience with strong software craftsmanship credentials (TDD, CI/CD, pairing) and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at Google. However, the resume lacks explicit, demonstrated production experience with GenAI/LLM systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, and multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI) that this Staff FDE role centers on. Customer-facing technical discovery leadership is also not evidenced. Worth a screen to probe depth of the recent AI-agent work.
strengths: 15+ years shipping production software across web, backend, and embedded
Recent Google role touches MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling
Strong engineering-excellence track record: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, mentoring
concerns: No explicit RAG, vector DB, or LLM evaluation/observability experience listed
No demonstrated customer-facing technical discovery or FDE-style consulting work
Cloud experience appears limited to AWS CDK; no GCP/Azure depth shown despite GenAI cloud focus

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agent-infra work at Google
